channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live Updates: Tehran threatens to retaliate after U.S. attacks vital Iranian oil hub - CBS News
item.description:
1. Live Updates: Tehran threatens to retaliate after U.S. attacks vital Iranian oil hub  CBS News

item.title: Russia Shuts Off Internet in Moscow as It Tests Nationwide Censorship System - WSJ
item.description:
1. Russia Shuts Off Internet in Moscow as It Tests Nationwide Censorship System  WSJ

  4. Moscow Reverts to 90s Communication Tools as Internet Outages Cause Chaos  UNITED24 Media
  5. Unexplained Moscow internet blackouts spark fears of web censorship plan  The Guardian
